notes: Official/published scam warnings per brand. lure_structure describes the pattern STRUCTURALLY (no 1:1 copy of real commercial emails). Use to seed brandwarning signals and analyst expectations, NOT as sole decisional ground truth.

warnings.title: Fake ANAF email about a fiscal 'irregularity'
warnings.modus_operandi: Email claims a 'possible irregularity identified in submitted fiscal declarations' and pushes the user to follow steps / open a link to 'fix' it, leading to a credential/card harvesting page.

lure_structure.sender_spoof: display name 'ANAF' from unrelated address (observed e.g. a generic non-anaf.ro mailbox)
lure_structure.urgency: remediere imediata pentru a evita consecinte

warnings.official_advice: Check notifications only inside SPV on anaf.ro; if none, the message is fake. ANAF does not request card payments by email.

warnings.title: Campaign using the identity of the Minister of Finance
warnings.modus_operandi: Messages impersonate a public official to add authority and redirect users to fraudulent sites requesting personal/financial data.

warnings.title: Fake FAN Courier 'shipment cannot be completed due to data errors'
warnings.modus_operandi: SMS claims the shipment cannot be completed because of data errors and urges the user to click a link to 'update information'; link goes to a lookalike domain harvesting card data.

lure_structure.domain_trick: slightly altered company name / unusual TLD / extra words

warnings.official_advice: Check shipment only on fancourier.ro or in the app. FAN never asks for card data; only name and IBAN are safe to share.

warnings.title: FAN Courier SMS leading to WhatsApp account takeover
warnings.modus_operandi: SMS says a parcel is linked to the user's number and asks to choose a locker; the page imitates FAN Courier but redirects to a malicious domain whose immediate objective is WhatsApp account takeover.

lure_structure.theme: colet legat de numarul tau / alege lockerul

warnings.title: Fake Posta Romana SMS asking to complete delivery data
warnings.modus_operandi: SMS appears to be from Posta Romana asking the recipient to access a SHORT URL to complete personal data needed for a parcel delivery; the page visually imitates the official site and collects personal/financial data.

lure_structure.domain_trick: short URL redirect to visually-cloned page

warnings.title: Fake 'Livrare prin OLX' / paid-item link requesting card data
warnings.modus_operandi: After agreeing to a transaction, the scammer sends a fake link mimicking 'Livrare prin OLX' where the SELLER is asked for card details and balance, supposedly to RECEIVE money. Often paired with fake FAN Courier/Sameday delivery links.

lure_structure.call_to_action: introdu datele cardului pentru a primi plata

warnings.official_advice: You never need card data or balance to RECEIVE money. Keep communication inside OLX.

warnings.title: Bank spoofing/vishing (BCR/BRD/ING/BT/CEC/Raiffeisen)
warnings.modus_operandi: Callers spoof bank/BNR caller-ID and claim a loan/transaction was made in the victim's name, then extract personal/card data or OTP under pretexts (confirm/cancel request).
warnings.official_advice: Banks never ask for full card number, CVV, OTP or internet-banking password. Hang up and call the bank's official number.

warnings.title: Spoofing/phishing/vishing investment-platform scam
warnings.modus_operandi: After a user signs up on a fake platform, attackers show fabricated growth of 'invested' sums to lure further deposits; uses spoofing/phishing/vishing.

warnings.title: Black Friday voucher/prize lures impersonating retailers
warnings.modus_operandi: Seasonal phishing promising vouchers (e.g. 500-1000 EUR), phones or 'test packages', hosted even on legitimate cloud storage to bypass spam filters; uses urgency and emoji.
warnings.note_for_engine: Marketing/prize text alone is NOT sufficient for PERICULOS; requires corroborating infra/credential-harvest signals.

warnings.title: Anniversary/gift lookalike impersonating Dedeman (T7-style)
warnings.modus_operandi: Lookalike domain (e.g. dedeman-aniversare.<tld>) presents an 'anniversary gift' to harvest data; primarily marketing-styled.
warnings.note_for_engine: BRAND_IMPERSONATION + marketing only => max SUSPECT/VERIFY_OFFICIAL; needs sensitive-form or infra signal for PERICULOS.
